name: Soulbreaker Crystal
description: Shrouded by motes of darkness, this weapon is the color of a deep bruise. This weapon functions as an enervating weapon. However, a negative level gained from an attack from a soulbreaker weapon does not fade 1 hour later. Instead, 24 hours after being struck, if the negative level or levels have not been purged, the subject must succeed on a DC 18 Fortitude save for each negative level or lose a character level.
unidentifiedDesc: A deep bruise-colored weapon augmentation crystal.
